title: Origins: Quirks
description: Origins mod addon that introduces unique abilities inspired by Quirks from My Hero Academia!
body:
**_IMPORTANT NOTE_: This add-on is in alpha and will be improved on over time. Please feel to report bugs and issues you may have!**

**Origins: Quirks** is an Origins mod add-on that introduces unique abilities inspired by the Quirks from *My Hero Academia*!

## Features
- **Custom Quirks**: A variety of Quirks inspired by *My Hero Academia* with unique abilities.

## Planned Features
- **Progression System**: Quirks grow stronger with use, allowing players to develop proficiency in their chosen Quirk.
- **Quirk Strength and Proficiency**: Abilities scale as players gain experience, increasing power and utility over time.
- **Skill Tree**: Select from multiple abilities based on your Quirk's strength and proficiency

## Current Quirks
- Acid
- All For One
- Blackwhip
- Blazing Hair
- Blueflame
- Dark Shadow
- Erasure
- Explosion
- Fa Jin
- Fierce Wings
- Frog
- Heal
- Invisibility
- Jet
- Larceny
- Life Force
- One For All (Will Be Heavily Reworked)
- Permeation
- Physical Charged
- Rivet Stab
- Severance
- Sloshed
- Smokescreen
- Somnambulist
- Steel
- Watergun (Will Be Heavily Reworked)
- Wisteria
- Zero Gravity

## Planned Quirks
- Hardening
- Limitless
- Decay
- Frost
- Sugar Rush
- Zoom
